<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]][[de:Metall-Büffel]][[hak:Sîn-chhiú]][[ja:辛丑]][[ko:신축]][[vi:Tân Sửu]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]][[zh-yue:辛丑]][[zh:辛丑]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=辛丑|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchū|p=xīnchǒu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=ɕin⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=sɐn tsʰɐu̯|mc=sin tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=sin ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Ox''' (辛丑) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by [[Yang Metal Rat|Gengzi]] and followed by [[Yang Water Tiger|Renyin]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the Heavenly Stem [[Kanoto (辛)]] represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (土生金) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Ox (辛丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: shinchu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (신축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

<!--
==
* Yin Metal Ox (辛丑) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのとうし (kanoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: しんかのうし (shinka-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: しんちゅう (shinchū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinchuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Sửu

-->
==Years of Yin Metal Ox==
A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 41|41 AD]]
* [[AD 101|101 AD]]
* [[161|161 AD]]
* [[221|221 AD]]
* [[281|281 AD]]
* [[341|341 AD]]
* [[401|401 AD]]
* [[461|461 AD]]
* [[521|521 AD]]
* [[581|581 AD]]
* [[641|641 AD]]
* [[701|701 AD]]
* [[761|761 AD]]
* [[821|821 AD]]
* [[881|881 AD]]
* [[941|941 AD]]
|
* [[1001|1001 AD]]
* [[1061|1061 AD]]
* [[1121|1121 AD]]
* [[1181|1181 AD]]
* [[1241|1241 AD]]
* [[1301|1301 AD]]
* [[1361|1361 AD]]
* [[1421|1421 AD]]
* [[1481|1481 AD]]
* [[1541|1541 AD]]
* [[1601|1601 AD]]
* [[1661|1661 AD]]
* [[1721|1721 AD]]
* [[1781|1781 AD]]
* [[1841|1841 AD]]
* [[1901|1901 AD]]
* [[1961|1961 AD]]
|
* [[2021|2021 AD]]
* [[2081 AD]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[24th century]]
* [[2381 AD]]
* [[2441 AD]]
* [[2501 AD]]
* [[2561 AD]]
* [[2621 AD]]
* [[2681 AD]]
* [[2741 AD]]
* [[2801 AD]]
* [[2861 AD]]
* [[2921 AD]]
* [[2981 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In [[Guangxu Era]] 27th Year and [[Meiji era]] 34th Year (1901 AD) – The [[Boxer Protocol|Beijing Protocol]], concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed.
==Months of Yin Metal Ox==
In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems [[Kanoto (辛)]] and [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here “month” may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from [[Xiaohan]] until the day before [[Lichun|Risshun]].)

==Days of Yin Metal Ox==
=== 選日 ===
The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]]
[[zh-yue:己巳]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Ox|qq=ja|辛丑|version=98658119|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Schlangeni]]
[[de:Yin Metal Ox]]

[[ja:辛丑]]
[[zh:辛丑]]
[[ko:신축]]
[[fr:Buffle de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Büffel]]
[[af:Houtslang (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Schlangeni]]
[[en:Wood Snake]]
[[fr:Serpent de boisboishak]]
[[it:Ki-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:기사 (간지)]]
[[vi:Kỷ Tỵ]]
[[za:Keiceij]]
[[zh:己巳]]
[[ar:Yin Metal Ox]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]]
[[hak:Sîn-chhiú]]
[[vi:Tân Sửu]]
[[za:Sincouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:辛丑]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sĭng-tiū]]
[[hak:Sîn-chhiú]]
[[vi:Tân Sửu]]
[[za:Sincouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:辛丑]]
{{wikidata link|Q904956}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
